pc.label: Barbara
pc.name: Goliath Barbarian 1
pc.languages: You can speak, read, and write Common and Giant.

action.name: Battleaxe
action.text: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1d8 + 3 slashing damage.

action.name: Javelin
action.text: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 1d6 + 3 piercing damage.

action.name: Dagger
action.text: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 1d4 + 3 piercing damage.
